query: BTS OREO limited edition collaboration 2026 details

mako.raw:
{"query":"BTS OREO limited edition collaboration 2026 details","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1657,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.forbes.com/sites/jeffbenjamin/2026/05/26/bts-oreo-drop-limited-edition-cookie-dedicated-to-korea-army-fans/","title":"OREO BTS Limited Edition Cookie: Flavor, Release Date, Details","content":"Jeff Benjamin is a New York-based writer covering global pop music.
America’s favorite cookie meets Korea as Oreo and BTS collaborate for a limited-edition flavor inspired by the group’s home country.
In BTS’ first-ever global snack partnership, set to hit more than 80 markets worldwide, members RM, Jin, Suga, J-Hope, Jimin, V and Jung Kook designed the “OREO & BTS Cookies” to feature a hotteok-inspired, brown-sugar pancake flavor."},{"url":"https://news.designrush.com/bts-oreo-hotteok-flavor-limited-edition","title":"OREO Launches Purple BTS Cookie in 80 Markets","content":"The rollout across 80 markets includes purple wafers, collectible embossments, and a fan-letter activation.
OREO is making a case for fandom as one of the most powerful sales drivers in modern snacking.
The Mondelez-owned snack brand has unveiled its first worldwide snacking collaboration with global pop sensation BTS.
The launch introduces a limited-edition cookie inspired by the Korean street food "hotteok" as it looks to deepen engagement with consumers through music and collectibles.
The new cookies feature brown sugar-pancake flavored creme sandwiched between the brand's first-ever purple wafers, a nod to the official color of the ARMY fandom.
The campaign will roll out across more than 80 markets beginning June 8, alongside a wider push on socials and real-life fan events.
The BTS x Oreo cookies will feature 13 unique embossments created to celebrate BTS’ 13th anniversary.
"For OREO to be the first snacking brand we’ve collaborated with globally is a huge honor," the pop group said in a joint statement.
Fans can preorder the cookies beginning June 1, before the wider retail launch a week later.
Personal memories make collaborations easier to believe: BTS tying the flavor to hotteok and childhood snacks gives the cookie more emotional weight.
BTS fans are deeply invested in authenticity.
OREO built multiple layers into the release.
The collectible embossments, the purple wafers, the fan letters, and even the hotteok flavor all give ARMYs something recognizable to connect with.
Check out our top experiential marketing agencies that design campaigns to spark joy among audiences."}]}
